violations.description: EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Handwashing was not acomplished prior to begining food prep after being outside of the truck.
CROSS CONTAMINATION (5 pts): Raw meat noted being stored above food not to be further cooked. Raw pork being stored in the cooler amongst ready to eat food items such as lettuce.

COOLING OF POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (5 pts): Pork fresh dairy and cut vegetables noted not being adequately cooled to prevent the growth of harmful bacteria. Observed temperatures ranging from 40?F - 63?F due to the non-powered nature of the cooler being used. Pork was cooked immediately due to being out of proper cold holding temperatures.

COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Coolers in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately. Due to the non-powered nature of the cooler and it's use of ice for cooling it is not able to maintain or recover back to 41 degrees or lower.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing lavatory in kitchen noted blocked with a shelf and equipment.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Coolers noted with no thermometer.

PLUMBING SYSTEM (1 pts): Faucet noted to be connected to hot and cold water lines incorrectly. Hot water on the cold handle and cold water on the hot handle. WIth the faucet handle incorrectly connected and the hot water temperature above 120?F the risk for scalding is very high.

inspections.comments: Due to the lack of water available in the plumbing system installed in food truck water must be restored prior to serving food and not until verification by the city department of health facilities assigned inspector.

violations.description: EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Employee noted handling food while hands were contaminated and did not wash hands before starting work.
WATER SUPPLY (4 pts): The water supply or its delivery system noted inadequate for meeting the needs of the establishment.
PERSON IN CHARGE (4 pts): The person in charge did not demonstrate knowledge of the proper food handling procedures and operations during the course of the inspection.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing lavatory in kitchen noted blocked with food and equipment.
